feat.name: Mariner's Fire
feat.text: You conjure uncanny orbs of spiritual flame that float above or below the water's surface. You can cast the *ignition* cantrip as a primal innate spell at will, heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up. Your *ignition* spell takes the form of orbs of fire, and you can cast it underwater.

traits.name: Tengu
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the tengu ancestry. Tengu are humanoids who resemble crows. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by tengu. An item with this trait is created and used by tengu.
